message:
fix: add explicit lifetime annotations to all TUI styled rendering functions

Systematically annotate 35+ rendering functions in render.rs and 2
widget helpers in widgets.rs with explicit lifetime parameters, tying
returned Text<'a>/Line<'a>/Vec<Line<'a>> to their borrowed
DashboardModel and Theme inputs.

Previously these relied on Rust's lifetime elision rules which can
silently produce incorrect lifetime bounds. Explicit annotations:
- Document the borrowing contract for each rendering function
- Prevent subtle lifetime mismatch bugs during future refactoring
- Enable storing returned Text/Line values in lifetime-bounded structs
- Mark separator_line as returning Line<'static> since it owns its data

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
